title: Powerful Drain Cleaner & Unblocker l 1KG Caustic Soda | Fast-Acting, Heavy-Duty Sink & Drain Cleaner | Strong & Effective | The Original & Best l Works 3x Better Than Bleach (Packaging Varies)
features: Drain cleaners and unblockers 1KG Caustic Soda Drain Cleaner Caustic Soda Powder Sink and Drain cleaner strong the original and best drain cleaner kitchen drain unblocker
description: Product Description Unblock Fast. Unblock Strong. Unblock Right. Professional Strength. Home-Use Ready. Tackle even the toughest drain clogs with this caustic soda drain cleaner — your go-to solution for industrial-strength cleaning power. Whether it's fat, hair, or grease causing the issue, our concentrated formula works fast, penetrating standing water and restoring free-flowing drains with ease. Safe for most plumbing systems and trusted by professionals and homeowners alike, this powerful powder keeps your pipes clear — and your home running smoothly. Built for Blockages. Trusted for Results. Fast-Acting Power Dissolves hair, grease, and organic waste in minutes. Safe When Used as Directed Handle with care using gloves and eye protection. 3 x Stronger Than Bleach Industrial performance that breaks down stubborn clogs. Multi-Purpose Use Ideal for sinks, showers, toilets, and outdoor drains. The Original & Best for a Reason – Why Caustic Soda Works The Caustic Soda Drain Cleaner is the professional-grade solution trusted for decades. When mixed with hot water, the sodium hydroxide activates to generate heat and break down grease, fats, hair, and organic debris lodged in your pipes. It penetrates standing water and tackles even the most stubborn blockages, clearing drains fast and restoring flow. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and utility drains. Due to its reactive strength, always wear gloves, safety goggles, and follow usage instructions. How to Use Safely & Effectively Pour ~100–200g of caustic soda into the drain Carefully add hot water to activate Wait 15–30 minutes Flush thoroughly with hot water Always wear gloves and eye protection Do not mix with other chemicals. General Information Product Name Caustic Soda Drain Cleaner – 1KG Format Crystalline Powder Manufacturer 151 Products Product Dimensions 2.54 x 2.54 x 2.54 cm; 100g Safety Requirements Gloves, eye protection, avoid inhalation
